body:
Content
- Update Manifest.toml and Project.toml
- Update truth data for the `sphere_held_suarez_equilmoist` case. Perfect model calibration data needs to be updated when the model version is updated. 
- Add common env configuration file for the cluster
- Set the `--color=no` option for Julia
- Update GHA to Julia 1.10
title: Update to Atmos v0.20.0
